page.title: Nutrition · Wan2Fit
page.description: Track your caloric intake and macros throughout the day.
page.heading: Nutrition
page.subtitle: Your day at a glance.
page.awareness_mode: Awareness mode: you track your intake without a fixed target. Enable one whenever you want.
page.footer_source: Food database: ANSES — CIQUAL Table (Etalab 2.0 licence)

setup.title: Calorie target · Wan2Fit
setup.description: Set your daily calorie target without sharing your body data.
setup.heading: Your calorie target
setup.intro: Setting a target is optional. Tracking works great in pure awareness mode (you see what you consume without a goal). If you want a target, you can calculate it with your body data (stays in your browser) or enter a number directly.
setup.option1_desc: You already know what you're aiming for. We only store that number, nothing else.
setup.target_error: The target must be between 1000 and 5000 kcal.

ai_pane.heading: AI Estimate
ai_pane.description_label: Describe your meal in a few words
ai_pane.description_placeholder: E.g. homemade bolognese pasta, 300 g, with 20 g parmesan
ai_pane.disclaimer: The estimate is indicative (±20%). The timestamp and description are sent to Anthropic for processing.

barcode_pane.searching: Looking up on Open Food Facts…
barcode_pane.error_invalid_barcode: Invalid barcode. Use EAN-8, EAN-13, UPC-A or UPC-E.
barcode_pane.error_not_found: This product is not listed on Open Food Facts.
barcode_pane.error_missing_nutrition: This product is listed but its nutrition data is incomplete.
barcode_pane.error_network: Open Food Facts is not responding right now. Retry or use the manual entry tab to add this product.

barcode_scanner.heading: Scan a barcode
barcode_scanner.frame_hint: Align the barcode in the frame…
barcode_scanner.permission_denied: Camera access denied. You can enter the code manually.
barcode_scanner.error: Cannot open camera. Enter the code manually.
barcode_scanner.manual_error: The barcode must contain 8 to 14 digits.
barcode_scanner.source_credit: Data provided via Open Food Facts (ODbL licence).

food_search.off_attribution: Extended results via Open Food Facts (ODbL licence).

insight.heading: AI analysis of your day
insight.teaser: Once per day, AI summarizes your dietary balance and suggests 1 to 3 concrete ideas for the rest of the day.
insight.disclaimer: Non-medical estimate. Adjust based on how you feel. One analysis per day.
insight.cta_desc: Once you've logged your meals, request an insight: 1-3 sentence summary + concrete tips for the rest of the day.

recurring.heading: Quick add
recurring.add_failed: Add failed. Check your connection and try again.

meal_form.heading: Add a meal
meal_form.error_qty: Quantity must be a positive number.

tdee.heading: Calculate your calorie target
tdee.intro: The information below is used only in your browser to estimate an indicative calorie target. It is never sent to our servers and will be forgotten when you close this page.
tdee.formula_note: Formula: Mifflin-St Jeor. Estimate ±150 kcal. Adjust after 2 weeks based on how you feel.
tdee.distribution: Indicative split: {{protein}} g protein · {{carbs}} g carbs · {{fat}} g fat
tdee.error_age: Age must be between {{min}} and {{max}} years.
tdee.error_height: Height must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm.
tdee.error_weight: Weight must be between {{min}} and {{max}} kg.
